summary.es: Desarrollo full-stack en el ecosistema sanitario: integración Salesforce ↔ HIS legacy mediante un bus basado en InterSystems IRIS for Health, aplicaciones .NET Framework, React, FileMaker, Magnolia CMS y Oracle SQL.
summary.en: Full-stack development in the healthcare ecosystem: Salesforce ↔ legacy HIS integration through an InterSystems IRIS for Health-based bus, .NET Framework apps, React, FileMaker, Magnolia CMS and Oracle SQL.
